records.question: What tracks named Free Speech For The Dumb were composed exactly by Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Free Speech For The Dumb' AND tracks.composer = 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks where tracks.name = 'Free Speech For The Dumb' and tracks.composer = 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright' limit 5
records.thought: Need to find tracks with exact name 'Free Speech For The Dumb' and exact composer 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright'. Since both are exact matches, I'll use = operator for both conditions.

records.question: Which tracks named Soldier Side - Intro composed by Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo are MPEG audio files lasting at least 63764 milliseconds and priced at most 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
WHERE tracks.milliseconds >= 63764 AND media_types.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 AND tracks.composer = 'Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo' AND tracks.name = 'Soldier Side - Intro'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks join media_types on tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id where tracks.name = 'Soldier Side - Intro' and tracks.composer = 'Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo' and media_types.name like '%mpeg%audio%' and tracks.milliseconds >= 63764 and tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 limit 5
records.thought: Need to filter tracks by exact name, composer, media type (MPEG audio), duration >= 63764ms, and price <= 0.99. Must join with media_types table to filter by media type name.

records.question: What tracks composed by Nando Reis have a unit price of exactly 0.99 and a file size of at most 9138846 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
WHERE tracks.bytes <= 9138846 AND tracks.composer = 'Nando Reis' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id, tracks.name, tracks.composer, tracks.unit_price, tracks.bytes from tracks where tracks.composer like '%nando reis%' and tracks.unit_price = 0.99 and tracks.bytes <= 9138846 limit 5
records.thought: We need to filter tracks by composer (using like for text matching), unit_price (exact match with =), and bytes (using <= for 'at most'). No joins are needed since all conditions are on the tracks table itself.

records.question: Which tracks have the name exactly equal to 'Daughter', have the composer exactly equal to 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder', and also have related genres and related playlist_tracks records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
JOIN playlist_tracks ON tracks.id = playlist_tracks.track_id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Daughter' AND tracks.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder'
records.pred_sql: select distinct tracks.id from tracks join genres on tracks.genre_id = genres.id join playlist_tracks on tracks.id = playlist_tracks.track_id where tracks.name = 'Daughter' and tracks.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder' limit 5
records.thought: Need to find tracks with exact name 'Daughter' and exact composer match, ensuring they have related genre and playlist_tracks records. This requires joins to genres and playlist_tracks tables to verify those relationships exist.

records.question: Which tracks named Koyaanisqatsi composed by Philip Glass are Soundtracks, have a Protected AAC audio file format, last exactly 206005 milliseconds, cost 0.99, and have at least 3305164 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
WHERE media_types.name = 'Protected AAC audio file' AND tracks.milliseconds = 206005 AND tracks.composer = 'Philip Glass' AND genres.name = 'Soundtrack' AND tracks.bytes >= 3305164 AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND tracks.name = 'Koyaanisqatsi'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id, tracks.name, tracks.composer, tracks.milliseconds, tracks.unit_price, tracks.bytes from tracks join genres on tracks.genre_id = genres.id join media_types on tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id where tracks.name = 'Koyaanisqatsi' and tracks.composer = 'Philip Glass' and genres.name = 'Soundtracks' and media_types.name = 'Protected AAC audio file' and tracks.milliseconds = 206005 and tracks.unit_price = 0.99 and tracks.bytes >= 3305164 limit 5
records.thought: This query requires filtering tracks by exact name, composer, duration, price, and bytes, plus joining to genres for 'Soundtracks' and media_types for 'Protected AAC audio file'. All conditions are specific exact matches or comparisons.

records.question: Which tracks named What It Takes are priced at 0.99 and available as MPEG audio files?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
WHERE media_types.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND tracks.name = 'What It Takes' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id, tracks.name, tracks.unit_price, media_types.name as media_type from tracks join media_types on tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id where tracks.name = 'What It Takes' and tracks.unit_price = 0.99 and media_types.name like '%mpeg%' limit 5
records.thought: Need to find tracks with exact name 'What It Takes', unit_price of 0.99, and MPEG audio media type. Must join with media_types table to filter by media type name.

records.question: Which tracks composed by Willie Dixon are priced at most 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
WHERE tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 AND tracks.composer = 'Willie Dixon'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id, tracks.name, tracks.composer, tracks.unit_price from tracks where tracks.composer like '%willie dixon%' and tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 limit 5
records.thought: We need to find tracks where the composer is Willie Dixon and the unit_price is at most 0.99. This only requires the tracks table with filters on composer (using like for text matching) and unit_price (using <= for numeric comparison).

records.question: Which tracks named O Que Vai Em Meu Coração composed by Mônica Marianno come from the album Demorou..., have a unit price of 0.99, last at least 255373 milliseconds, and are no more than 8366846 bytes by artist Mônica Marianno?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE albums.title = 'Demorou...' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND tracks.bytes <= 8366846 AND tracks.milliseconds >= 255373 AND artists.name = 'Mônica Marianno' AND tracks.composer = 'Mônica Marianno' AND tracks.name = 'O Que Vai Em Meu Coração'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks join albums on tracks.album_id = albums.id join artists on albums.artist_id = artists.id where tracks.name = 'O Que Vai Em Meu Coração' and tracks.composer = 'Mônica Marianno' and albums.title = 'Demorou...' and tracks.unit_price = 0.99 and tracks.milliseconds >= 255373 and tracks.bytes <= 8366846 and artists.name = 'Mônica Marianno' limit 5
records.thought: This query requires joining tracks with albums and artists tables to filter by track name, composer, album title, artist name, unit price, milliseconds, and bytes. All conditions are specific values that must match exactly.
